cot_prefix: Okay, let me read the passage carefully and figure out the answer to the question. The question is: "When he was stopped by a policeman, he ___." The possible answers are: (A) was driving at a high speed (B) was driving onto the main road (C) was going to stop his car (D) was driving slowly Let me analyze the events in the passage step by step. The passage says that Mr. Williams saw a sign that said "SLOW" at a crossroad. According to the rules mentioned in the beginning of the passage, at crossroads with a "SLOW" sign, drivers should slow down but do not have to stop unless there is something coming along the main road.
